title: Renier_'s Happy Ghast
description: Replaces the Ghast texture into the happy Ghast in my own style that was showcased in Minecraft Live 2025.
body:
# Happy Ghast Texture Pack

  Bring joy to the Nether with the Happy Ghast Texture Pack! This pack replaces the default Ghast texture with a cheerful, custom-designed version in my own unique style, as showcased in Minecraft Live 2025. Say goodbye to the spooky, sad Ghast and welcome a friendlier face to your Nether adventures. Perfect for those who want a more lighthearted experience without altering the game's core feel.

## ✨ Features:
- ✅ Custom hand-drawn happy Ghast texture
- ✅ Faithful to the original design but with a cheerful twist
- ✅ Perfect for a more positive Nether atmosphere

Download now and make your Nether a happier place! 🎉
